basic_details.job_title: IIFCL Projects Limited (IPL) Individual Consultants Recruitment 2026: 65 Specializations, Apply on Rolling Basis
basic_details.organization_name: IIFCL Projects Limited (IPL), a wholly owned subsidiary of IIFCL (Government of India Enterprise)
basic_details.application_mode: Email or Post (no online portal specified)
basic_details.job_location: Delhi, Chennai, Amaravati (AP), Ahmedabad, Northeast Region, and Anywhere in India (post-specific)
basic_details.short_information: IIFCL Projects Limited (IPL), a wholly owned subsidiary of India Infrastructure Finance Company Limited (IIFCL), a Government of India Enterprise, has invited applications for engagement of Individual Consultants (IC) – Full Time on a contractual basis. The advertisement is on a rolling basis, covering 65 IC Codes across specializations such as Project & Contract Management, Procurement, Finance, Legal, PPP, Energy, Environment, Tourism, Urban Planning, GIS, and MSME-related roles. Consultants will be stationed at IPL's Head Office in Delhi, its branch offices, or across various states where I

important_dates.advertisement publish date: 17 July 2026 (as indicated by the file name of the official notification; not explicitly stated within the notification text)
important_dates.application window: One year from the date of publishing this advertisement - applications accepted throughout the year on a rolling basis

age_limit.age_details: 2 years, extendable by 1 year at a time up to a maximum of 5 years (2+1+1+1)

salary_details.details: Remuneration for Individual Consultants is decided within the corresponding band, based on years of post-qualification relevant experience. Final remuneration for a selected candidate depends on expectations, experience, and expertise, and the decision of IPL is final and binding. | Consultants will also be allowed to undertake tours as required by their duties, for which TA/DA and Hotel Accommodation shall be paid or reimbursed as per Company policy.

selection_process: Selection is done by way of Interview. Merely satisfying the eligibility norms does not entitle an applicant to be called for interview. IPL reserves the right to call only the requisite number of candidates for interview after preliminary screening/shortlisting
and business requirement. IPL will call only those candidates who match the requirements for the specific grade

and IC Code indicated in the application form. Applying for a higher grade does not automatically make the applicant eligible for a lower grade. Applicants must apply separately for each IC Code and Grade Code. Shortlisted applicants will be required to attend an interview in Delhi or in online mode
as decided by IPL in its absolute discretion. IPL will not reimburse any expenditure incurred by an applicant for appearing at the interview. IPL reserves the right to appoint none
or more Individual Consultants against any IC Code.
how_to_apply: Applications can be submitted by email or by post, depending on the IC Code applied for.
Postal Address (alternative mode): AGM-HR, IIFCL Projects Limited (IPL), 3rd Floor, Tower – E, World Trade Centre (WTC), Nauroji Nagar, New Delhi - 110029
Identify the IC Code and Grade Code applicable to your qualification and experience.
Prepare the application email/post with the subject line format: "Application_IC CODE_Insert IC Code_Name of Applicant".
Attach the duly filled application form (with photo, signed by the applicant on each page) in both MS Word (editable) and PDF formats.
Attach the signed advertisement notice as a token of acceptance (PDF).
Attach copies of education certificates and mark sheets (PDF).
Attach copies of experience certificates, appointment letters, and latest salary slip of current employer (PDF).
Send the complete application to the relevant email ID based on the IC Code range, or by post to the AGM-HR address above.
Apply separately for each IC Code and Grade Code if applying for more than one specialization.

content_sections.heading: IPL Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Applications are received throughout the year, including from candidates staying abroad and those posting applications from Andaman & Nicobar Islands, Lakshadweep, Assam, Meghalaya, Arunachal Pradesh, Mizoram, Manipur, Nagaland, Tripura, Sikkim, the Union Territories of Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh, and Lahaul and Spiti district of Himachal Pradesh.

content_sections.text: Applicants must apply against a specific IC Code and Grade Code, as per the eligibility criteria mentioned for each. Candidates are required to explicitly state the IC Code and Grade Code they are applying against, as asked for on page 1 of the detailed application format.

rows.position_specialization: Project Management and Transaction Advisory Expert
Project Management and Transaction Advisory Expert

content_sections.heading: IPL Recruitment 2026 Eligibility: Nationality
content_sections.text: Applicants must be a Citizen of India. All qualifications should be recognized by UGC/AICTE/AIU (Government of India). For qualifications acquired from a foreign (international) institute or university, the same may be treated at par with qualifications from Indian institutes/universities, provided the candidate produces an equivalency certificate from the Competent Authority.

content_sections.heading: IPL Recruitment 2026: Remuneration by Grade
content_sections.text: Remuneration for Individual Consultants is decided within the corresponding band, based on years of post-qualification relevant experience. Final remuneration for a selected candidate depends on expectations, experience, and expertise, and the decision of IPL is final and binding. Consultants will also be allowed to undertake tours as required by their duties, for which TA/DA and Hotel Accommodation shall be paid or reimbursed as per Company policy.

content_sections.heading: IPL Recruitment 2026 Selection Procedure
content_sections.text: Selection is done by way of Interview. Merely satisfying the eligibility norms does not entitle an applicant to be called for interview. IPL reserves the right to call only the requisite number of candidates for interview after preliminary screening/shortlisting, with reference to qualifications, experience, suitability, city preference, and business requirement. IPL will call only those candidates who match the requirements for the specific grade, position, and IC Code indicated in the application form. Applying for a higher grade does not automatically make the applicant eligible for a lower grade. Applicants must apply separately for each IC Code and Grade Code. Shortlisted applicants will be required to attend an interview in Delhi or in online mode, as decided by IPL in its absolute discretion. IPL will not reimburse any expenditure incurred by an applicant for appearing at the interview. IPL reserves the right to appoint none, one, or more Individual Consultants against any IC Code.

content_sections.heading: Period and Nature of Engagement
content_sections.text: Individual Consultants will be engaged for a fixed period of two years, which may be extended by one year at a time, up to a maximum tenure of five years (2+1+1+1 years), for providing services on specific projects as per requirement. Continuation beyond the first and subsequent years is contingent on a satisfactory Annual Performance Review based on defined Key Performance Indicators. Engagement is on a Contractual and Full-Time basis, during which the selected candidate is not allowed to take up appointment/engagement/assignment anywhere else.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IPL Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Applications can be submitted by email or by post, depending on the IC Code applied for. Postal Address (alternative mode): AGM-HR, IIFCL Projects Limited (IPL), 3rd Floor, Tower – E, World Trade Centre (WTC), Nauroji Nagar, New Delhi - 110029

content_sections.heading: Required Documents for IPL Consultant Application

Duly filled application form with photo (signed on each page)

Copy of education certificates, mark sheets, etc.
Copy of experience certificates, appointment letters, latest salary slip of current employer, etc.

faq.question: Q1. How many specializations (IC Codes) are covered in IPL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The advertisement covers 65 IC Codes across specializations such as Project & Contract Management, Procurement, Finance, Legal, PPP, Energy, Environment, Tourism, Urban Planning, GIS, and MSME-related roles.

faq.question: Q2. Is IPL Individual Consultant recruitment a one-time process or ongoing?
faq.answer: It is on a rolling basis. IPL maintains a database of applications throughout the year and engages consultants from this pool as and when requirements arise in specific areas/specializations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the remuneration for IPL Individual Consultants?
faq.answer: Remuneration ranges from ₹70,000 per month for Young Professionals to ₹2,65,000–₹3,30,000 per month for Senior Consultants (Grade III), depending on post-qualification experience. Final remuneration depends on the candidate's expectations, experience, and expertise, at IPL's discretion.

faq.question: Q4. Can I apply for more than one IC Code?
faq.answer: Yes, but applicants must apply separately for each IC Code and Grade Code, following the application format and subject line convention specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for IPL Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent by email to the address corresponding to the relevant IC Code range, or by post to the AGM-HR address in New Delhi, along with the complete set of required documents.

faq.question: Q6. What is the period of engagement for IPL Individual Consultants?
faq.answer: The engagement is for a fixed period of two years, extendable by one year at a time up to a maximum of five years (2+1+1+1), subject to a satisfactory Annual Performance Review each year.

faq.question: Q7. Can an Individual Consultant take up other assignments during the engagement period?
faq.answer: No. The engagement is on a full-time contractual basis, and the selected candidate is not allowed to take up any other appointment, engagement, or assignment elsewhere during this period.

faq.question: How many specializations (IC Codes) are covered in IPL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The advertisement covers 65 IC Codes across specializations such as Project & Contract Management, Procurement, Finance, Legal, PPP, Energy, Environment, Tourism, Urban Planning, GIS, and MSME-related roles.

faq.question: Is IPL Individual Consultant recruitment a one-time process or ongoing?
faq.answer: It is on a rolling basis. IPL maintains a database of applications throughout the year and engages consultants from this pool as and when requirements arise in specific areas/specializations.

faq.question: What is the remuneration for IPL Individual Consultants?
faq.answer: Remuneration ranges from ₹70,000 per month for Young Professionals to ₹2,65,000–₹3,30,000 per month for Senior Consultants (Grade III), depending on post-qualification experience. Final remuneration depends on the candidate's expectations, experience, and expertise, at IPL's discretion.
